betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Digamma Laser Crystal§f is an advanced laser component using §bDigamma particles§f.

§ePower:§f
• §eExponentially more powerful§f than Spark crystals
• Requires §b6.08 MHE/s§f in FEL
• Ultimate laser amplification

§c§4DANGER:§f
• Production is extremely dangerous
• Requires handling Digamma particles
• Full hazmat gear mandatory

§eUse in FEL:§f
• Highest power laser output
• §aOnly Digamma doesn't destroy blocks in beam path§f
• Required for ultimate SILEX processing

§aTip:§f Save this for when you need the absolute maximum laser power.
